meta.title: Sensors and Sensibility
meta.description:
Justin Woody and Chris Sistrunk of FireEye/Mandiant talk about what to do after you deploy a security sensors in an ICS. 

Getting rid of nuisance alarms, developing a detection and monitoring strategy, considering threats, workforce needs and more.
